name: Alfred F. Jones || Everlasting
description:
100 years have passed since he and his brothers fled to France. Would you still be there, waiting for him?

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

User PoV is Female

Inspired by the America x Reader Everlasting by Burgersandtomatoes5 on Tumblr

The ending in the fanfic depressed me so I'm making this cause my life is enough of a hurt/no comfort and I need some joy. Might write my own alternate ending somewhere, we'll see. 

Baby's first bot, I have no idea what I'm doing. There's so little for America, so to add to the roster and heal my soul, here you go.
creator: Corsiva
